items.title: AJGA Will Lowery Junior Championship Qualifier Begins Tomorrow at Cramer Mountain Club
items.why: On 2026-04-15: Qualifying rounds start April 15 at Cramer Mountain Club in Gaston County, NC, ahead of the 54-hole championship April 17–19 featuring 78 of the nation's top juniors.

items.title: The Jupiter Invitational Debuts May 7–9 at Jonathan's Landing With a Curated Mid-Am Field
items.why: On 2026-04-15: The newest stop on the mid-amateur calendar features a select field of elite mid-am and senior players on the Gil Hanse–designed Match Course in Jupiter, FL. midamgolfHQ will be tracking the action.

items.title: U.S. Senior Open Final Qualifying Set for May 18–June 15 at 12 Sites Nationwide
items.why: On 2026-04-15: With local qualifying running through May 7 at 32 sites, the next phase is final qualifying at 12 sites. Amateurs 50+ with a 2.4 index chasing spots at Scioto Country Club in July.

items.title: U.S. Mid-Amateur Entry Opens April 22 at Sand Valley Resort
items.why: On 2026-04-14: The USGA has announced that entries for the 2026 U.S. Mid-Amateur Championship open on April 22, with the championship set for September 26 through October 1 at Sand Valley Resort (The Lido) in Nekoosa, Wisconsin. Competitors must be at least 25 years old and carry a Handicap Index of 2.4 or lower. Entry closes July 22.

items.title: Bryan Hoops Goes Back-to-Back at Society of Seniors Senior Masters
items.why: On 2026-04-11: Bryan Hoops of Tempe, Arizona closed with a 3-under 69 to win the 2026 Senior Masters at Indian Wells Golf Resort by one shot over Rick Stimmel, finishing at 7-under 208 for the tournament. It marks Hoops' second consecutive Senior Masters title in the Society of Seniors' marquee spring event.

items.title: AJGA Will Lowery Junior Championship Tees Off This Week in North Carolina
items.why: On 2026-04-14: The AJGA Will Lowery Junior Championship begins this week at Cramer Mountain Club in Gaston County, North Carolina, running April 16-19. The 54-hole stroke play event features 78 top junior golfers from across the country competing on the challenging layout along the South Fork River.

items.title: U.S. Mid-Amateur Entry Opens April 22 for Sand Valley Showdown
items.why: On 2026-04-13: The USGA has announced that entries for the 2026 U.S. Mid-Amateur Championship open on April 22 and close July 22. The championship will be held September 26 through October 1 at Sand Valley Resort in Nekoosa, Wisconsin. Mid-amateur players aged 25 and older looking to compete for one of the most prestigious titles in amateur golf should mark their calendars and prepare their entries for what promises to be a memorable week at one of America's most acclaimed inland courses.

items.title: Bryan Hoops Goes Back-to-Back at Society of Seniors Senior Masters
items.why: On 2026-04-09: Bryan Hoops of Tempe, Arizona, successfully defended his title at the 2026 Society of Seniors Senior Masters, held April 7–9 at Indian Wells Golf Resort in Indian Wells, California. Hoops closed with a 3-under 69 in the final round to finish at 7-under 208, claiming back-to-back victories in the 54-hole invitational stroke play event. The win cements his status as one of the top amateur senior players in the country.

items.title: AJGA Will Lowery Junior Championship Heads to Gaston County
items.why: On 2026-04-13: The AJGA Will Lowery Junior Championship tees off April 16–19 at Cramer Mountain Club in Gaston County, North Carolina. The 54-hole stroke play event will feature 78 of the nation's top junior golfers competing over three rounds on a challenging course along the South Fork River. The tournament is part of the AJGA's packed spring schedule, which offers 32 events from March through May and gives players opportunities to earn Performance Based Entry stars for premier summer tournaments.

items.title: U.S. Mid-Am Champ Brandon Holtz Lives Out His Masters Dream at Augusta
items.why: On 2026-04-09: Brandon Holtz, a 39-year-old realtor from Bloomington, Illinois, teed it up at Augusta National this week after winning the U.S. Mid-Amateur at Troon last September. A former Division I basketball player at Illinois State who stepped away from competitive golf for 12 years, Holtz represented the mid-am community on golf's biggest stage. He missed the cut but called the experience the fulfillment of a lifelong dream.

items.title: Bryan Hoops Goes Back-to-Back at Society of Seniors Senior Masters
items.why: On 2026-04-11: Bryan Hoops of Tempe, Arizona fired a final-round 3-under 69 to edge Rick Stimmel by one shot and defend his title at the Senior Masters, held April 9–11 at Indian Wells Golf Resort in California. Hoops finished at 7-under 208 (71-68-69) for his second consecutive Senior Masters victory. Greg Mokler won the Super Legend division by four strokes.

items.title: Four AJGA Juniors Reach ANWA Final Round at Augusta National
items.why: On 2026-04-04: Four current AJGA members advanced to the final round of the Augusta National Women's Amateur, led by 17-year-old Asterisk Talley of Chowchilla, California, who set the ANWA record for consecutive bogey-free holes at 36. Talley held a two-shot lead heading into Saturday's final round at Augusta National but stumbled on the back nine. Colombia's Maria Jose Marin claimed the title at 14-under par, setting a new ANWA scoring record.

items.title: U.S. Mid-Am Champ Brandon Holtz Reflects on Masters Debut
items.why: On 2026-04-11: Brandon Holtz, the 39-year-old real estate agent from Illinois who won the 2025 U.S. Mid-Amateur at Troon Country Club, saw his Masters week come to an end after missing the cut at Augusta National. Holtz shot 81 in Round 1 and finished at 15-over, but said he had “already won” simply by earning a tee time at Augusta. His journey from reinstated amateur to Mid-Am champion to Masters competitor is the kind of story that defines the mid-am game.

items.title: Society of Seniors Senior Masters Wraps Up at Indian Wells
items.why: On 2026-04-11: The 2026 Senior Masters presented by Callaway Golf concluded its three-day run at Indian Wells, California this week (April 9–11). One of the marquee events on the Society of Seniors calendar, the Senior Masters draws top amateur senior players from across the country competing for SoS Player of the Year points and World Amateur Golf Ranking credit. The Founders Cup follows next week in nearby Rancho Mirage (April 13–16).

items.title: AJGA Juniors Shine at Augusta National Women’s Amateur Despite Talley’s Final-Round Collapse
items.why: On 2026-04-11: Four AJGA juniors made the final-round cut at the 2026 Augusta National Women’s Amateur, headlined by 17-year-old Asterisk Talley who held an 11-under lead through 36 holes. Talley set the ANWA record for consecutive bogey-free holes at 36 before a quadruple-bogey on the iconic 12th hole Saturday derailed her title bid. Colombia’s Maria Jose Marin ultimately claimed the championship at 14-under, while Talley finished tied for fourth.

items.title: U.S. Mid-Amateur Champion Brandon Holtz Lives Out His Masters Dream at Augusta
items.why: On 2026-04-10: Brandon Holtz, the 39-year-old Bloomington, Illinois real estate agent who won the 2025 U.S. Mid-Amateur at Troon Country Club, shot a first-round 81 (+9) on Thursday at Augusta National. Holtz tees off for Round 2 at 12:15 p.m. ET on Friday, paired with Bubba Watson and Nicolas Echavarria. Twelve years after stepping away from competitive golf, Holtz earned his spot in the Masters field and his journey from mid-am circuit grinder to Augusta remains one of the best feel-good stories of the week.

items.title: Society of Seniors Senior Masters Underway at Indian Wells Golf Resort
items.why: On 2026-04-10: The 2026 Society of Seniors Senior Masters presented by Callaway Golf is being contested April 9–11 at Indian Wells Golf Resort in California. The 54-hole stroke-play event features divisions for Senior (55–64), Super Senior (65–69), Legend (70–74), and Super Legend (75+) competitors, making it one of the premier amateur senior events of the spring season.

items.title: Maria Jose Marin Wins Augusta National Women's Amateur as AJGA Juniors Shine
items.why: On 2026-04-10: Colombia's Maria Jose Marin captured the 2026 Augusta National Women's Amateur title with a final-round 68, finishing at 14-under par. Four AJGA juniors made the cut, led by top-ranked Asterisk Talley of Chowchilla, California, who held the 36-hole lead at 11-under before a quadruple bogey on the iconic No. 12 hole derailed her bid. Talley recovered to play her final six holes at one-under, showing the resilience that has made her the No. 1 player in the Rolex AJGA Rankings.

items.title: AJGA Will Lowery Junior Championship Heads to Cramer Mountain Club April 16–19
items.why: On 2026-04-09: 78 of the nation's top junior golfers descend on Cramer Mountain Club in Gaston County, NC for 54 holes of stroke play. Qualifying rounds begin April 15, first competitive round tees off April 17.

items.title: U.S. Mid-Amateur Champion Brandon Holtz Tees Off at the Masters Today at 9:02am ET
items.why: On 2026-04-09: The 39-year-old Illinois real estate agent earned his invite by winning the 2025 U.S. Mid-Amateur at Troon Country Club. Grouped with Bubba Watson and Nicolas Echavarria for Round 1.

items.title: U.S. Senior Open Local Qualifying Underway Across 32 Sites — Amateur Hopefuls Chase Spots at Scioto
items.why: On 2026-04-09: Local qualifying running April 2–May 7 at 32 sites across 25 states, amateurs 50+ chasing spots at Scioto Country Club in Columbus, Ohio this July.

items.title: USGA Announces Largest-Ever 2026 U.S. National Junior Team — 24 Athletes From 10 States
items.why: On 2026-04-08: 12 boys and 12 girls selected for the largest U.S. National Junior Team ever. 14 return from last year's team with 10 newcomers joining the roster. U.S. Junior Amateur set for July 20–25 at Saucon Valley.

items.title: Brandon Holtz, U.S. Mid-Amateur Champion, Tees It Up at the Masters Tomorrow
items.why: On 2026-04-08: The 39-year-old Illinois real estate agent earned his invite by winning the 2025 U.S. Mid-Amateur at Troon Country Club. The oldest amateur in the field by nearly a decade.

items.title: Society of Seniors Senior Masters Begins Tomorrow at Indian Wells Golf Resort
items.why: On 2026-04-08: The 54-hole stroke play event starts April 9 at Indian Wells in California, featuring up to 120 senior amateurs across four age divisions.

items.title: Miles Russell Rallies to Defend Title at Junior Invitational at Sage Valley
items.why: On 2026-04-07: Jacksonville Beach's Miles Russell closed with a 5-under 67 to win the boys division at 15-under 273, defending his title at the premier junior event outside Augusta. Asterisk Talley claimed the girls title at 8-under 280.

items.title: U.S. Mid-Amateur Entries Open April 22 — Championship Headed to Sand Valley's The Lido
items.why: On 2026-04-07: Entries for the 2026 U.S. Mid-Amateur open April 22, with the championship set for September 26–October 1 at Sand Valley Resort's acclaimed Lido Course in Nekoosa, Wisconsin — a recreation of the legendary 1914 C.B. Macdonald design.

items.title: Society of Seniors Senior Masters Tees Off This Week at Indian Wells
items.why: On 2026-04-07: The 2026 Senior Masters presented by Callaway Golf begins April 9 at Indian Wells Golf Resort in California, featuring up to 120 senior amateurs competing across four age divisions in 54 holes of stroke play.

items.title: María José Marín Wins 2026 Augusta National Women's Amateur, Becoming First Latin American Champion
items.why: On 2026-04-06: The 19-year-old Colombian finished at a record-breaking 14-under par, winning by four strokes. Co-favorite Asterisk Talley fell out of contention after hitting into Rae's Creek twice on the 12th for a quadruple bogey.

items.title: USGA Opens Entry for 2026 U.S. Mid-Amateur at Sand Valley's The Lido Starting April 22
items.why: On 2026-04-06: Entry for the 2026 U.S. Mid-Amateur Championship opens April 22 and runs through July 22. The championship is open to amateurs 25 and older with a Handicap Index of 3.4 or better, contested September 26–October 1 at Sand Valley Resort's The Lido course in Nekoosa, Wisconsin.

items.title: USGA Announces Local Qualifying Sites for 2026 U.S. Senior Open at Scioto Country Club
items.why: On 2026-04-06: Local qualifying for the 46th U.S. Senior Open is now underway at 32 sites across 25 states through May 7. Final qualifying follows at 12 sites nationwide from May 18–June 15. The championship is set for July 2–5 at Scioto Country Club in Columbus, Ohio.

items.title: Masters week: Brandon Holtz and five fellow amateurs descend on Augusta National
items.why: On 2026-04-05: It's Masters week. U.S. Mid-Amateur champion Brandon Holtz arrives at Augusta National as one of six amateurs in the 2026 Masters field (April 9-12). The Illinois native and reinstated amateur earned his spot by winning the U.S. Mid-Am at Troon Country Club last September, capping a remarkable comeback to amateur golf after six years on the mini-tour circuit.

items.title: Society of Seniors Senior Masters tees off this week at Indian Wells (April 9-11)
items.why: On 2026-04-05: The Society of Seniors heads to Indian Wells Golf Resort in Indian Wells, CA, this week for the 2026 Senior Masters presented by Callaway Golf (April 9-11). The 54-hole stroke-play event features four divisions — Senior (55-64), Super Senior (65-69), Legend (70-74), and Super Legend (75+) — across the Players and Celebrity courses.

items.title: Maria Jose Marin wins ANWA in record fashion as Asterisk Talley's lead evaporates at Amen Corner
items.why: On 2026-04-05: Colombia's Maria Jose Marin captured the 2026 Augusta National Women's Amateur with a record-setting 14-under 202 total, winning by four over Spain's Andrea Revuelta. Marin was the only player to shoot all three rounds in the 60s, closing with a 68 at Augusta National. Overnight leader Asterisk Talley saw her one-shot lead disappear with a quadruple bogey at the 12th after hitting into Rae's Creek twice.

items.title: Brandon Holtz gearing up for Masters week at Augusta National
items.why: On 2026-04-04: U.S. Mid-Amateur champion Brandon Holtz is in final preparations for his Masters debut next week (April 9-12). The Illinois native and reinstated amateur punched his ticket by winning the U.S. Mid-Am at Troon Country Club last September and will be one of six amateurs teeing it up at Augusta National.

items.title: U.S. Senior Open local qualifying underway — 32 sites, 25 states, through May 7
items.why: On 2026-04-04: The road to Scioto Country Club is officially open. U.S. Senior Open local qualifying is underway at 32 sites across 25 states, running through May 7. Amateurs 50-plus with a Handicap Index of 2.4 or better are eligible. Successful qualifiers advance to final qualifying at 12 sites from May 18 to June 15.

items.title: Asterisk Talley carries one-shot lead into ANWA final round at Augusta National today
items.why: On 2026-04-04: Asterisk Talley takes a one-shot lead into today's final round at Augusta National after going bogey-free for 36 holes at Champions Retreat (66-67, 11-under). The 17-year-old and 2025 runner-up has tied the lowest 36-hole score in ANWA history. Meja Ortengren and Maria Jose Marin are one back at 10-under. Coverage begins at 12 p.m. ET on NBC.

items.title: New player profile: Brett Patterson, 2026 Snedeker Memorial champion
items.why: On 2026-04-03: Our newest player profile is live on Instagram — featuring Brett Patterson out of Oxford, MS. Brett's playoff victory at The Snedeker Memorial vaulted him to 20th in the world mid-am rankings. He's also the 2025 Mississippi State Mid-Am champion and a U.S. Mid-Am qualifier. One to watch this season.

items.title: Golfweek Senior Amateur concludes at Desert Willow's Firecliff Course
items.why: On 2026-04-03: The Golfweek Senior Amateur wrapped up yesterday after three rounds at Desert Willow Golf Resort's Firecliff Course in Palm Desert, CA (March 31 - April 2). Thomas Brennan and Greg Sanders led after an opening-round 68, with reigning Golfweek Senior Division National champion Jerry Gunthorpe lurking one back in a tie for third.

items.title: Asterisk Talley takes 36-hole lead at Augusta National Women's Amateur at 11-under
items.why: On 2026-04-03: Asterisk Talley was bogey-free for the second straight day, carding rounds of 66-67 to reach 11-under and take a one-shot lead into Saturday's final round at Augusta National. Meja Ortengren and Maria Jose Marin sit one back at 10-under. The top 30 and ties from Champions Retreat advance to Augusta National for the finale.

items.title: Brandon Holtz represents mid-am golfers on the biggest stage — Masters week is here
items.why: On 2026-04-02: U.S. Mid-Amateur champion Brandon Holtz is set to tee it up at Augusta National as one of six amateurs in the 2026 Masters field (April 9-12). The Illinois native and reinstated amateur earned his invite by topping Jeg Coughlin III, 3 and 2, in last September's U.S. Mid-Am final at Troon Country Club.

items.title: Golfweek Senior Amateur wraps up today at Desert Willow's Firecliff Course
items.why: On 2026-04-02: The Golfweek Senior Amateur concludes today after three rounds at Desert Willow Golf Resort's Firecliff Course in Palm Desert, CA (March 31 - April 2). The event draws top senior amateurs from across the country to one of the desert's most demanding layouts.

items.title: Asterisk Talley fires bogey-free 66 to surge into ANWA contention
items.why: On 2026-04-02: Asterisk Talley carded an impressive bogey-free 6-under 66, capped by an eagle hole-out from a bunker, to sit one shot off the lead at the Augusta National Women's Amateur at Champions Retreat Golf Club. The top 30 and ties after Thursday's second round advance to Saturday's final round at Augusta National.

items.title: ANWA Round 1: Maria Jose Marin fires bogey-free 65 to grab lead at Champions Retreat
items.why: On 2026-04-01: Colombia's Maria Jose Marin carded seven birdies in a bogey-free opening round to take the clubhouse lead at the seventh Augusta National Women's Amateur. Asterisk Talley — fresh off her Junior Invitational at Sage Valley win — eagled her final hole to sit one back, with Texas A&M's Vanessa Borovilos also in the hunt. The top 30 and ties after Thursday's second round advance to Augusta National for Saturday's final round.

items.title: Six amateurs headed to Augusta — including the U.S. Mid-Am champion
items.why: On 2026-04-01: Six amateurs will tee it up at the 2026 Masters next week, each earning their invite through a different pathway. The U.S. Mid-Amateur champion headlines the group as the oldest rookie in the field at 39, ranked 3,262nd in WAGR — a testament to the unique access the Mid-Am provides to golf's biggest stage.

items.title: Society of Seniors Senior Masters set for Indian Wells Resort, April 9-11
items.why: On 2026-04-01: The Society of Seniors circuit heads to Indian Wells Resort (Players and Celebrity Course) in Indian Wells, CA for the Senior Masters April 9-11. The event follows the Ed Tutwiler Two-Man at Pawleys Island and leads into the Founders Cup in Rancho Mirage, CA (April 13-16), with U.S. Senior Open local qualifying also underway at sites nationwide through May 7.

items.title: The midamgolfHQ newsletter launches tomorrow — subscribe now
items.why: On 2026-03-31: The midamgolfHQ newsletter goes live tomorrow. Stay on top of every mid-amateur tournament, qualifier, and storyline across the country — delivered straight to your inbox. Subscribe today so you don't miss the first edition.

items.title: U.S. Senior Open local qualifying tees off this week at 32 sites nationwide
items.why: On 2026-03-31: Local qualifying for the 46th U.S. Senior Open Championship begins this week, with 18-hole qualifiers running April 2 through May 7 at 32 sites across 25 states. Amateurs and professionals age 50-plus with a Handicap Index of 2.4 or better are eligible. Successful qualifiers advance to final qualifying at 12 sites from May 18 to June 15, with the championship set for Scioto Country Club in Columbus, OH.

items.title: Augusta National Women's Amateur tees off tomorrow — 72-player field features 48 of top 50 in WAGR
items.why: On 2026-03-31: The seventh Augusta National Women's Amateur begins tomorrow at Champions Retreat Golf Club in Evans, GA, with the first two rounds on April 1-2 before the top 30 and ties move to Augusta National for Saturday's final round. World No. 1 Kiara Romero headlines the 72-player field, joined by past champions Tsubasa Kajitani and Anna Davis.

items.title: Gibbons & Stewart claim 58th Champions Cup Four-Ball at 21-under
items.why: On 2026-03-30: Josh Gibbons and Kade Stewart ran away with the 58th Champions Cup Invitational at Champions Golf Club in Houston, posting rounds of 68-63-67-65 for a 21-under 263 total and a three-shot victory. Marcus Jones/Brad Mason and Will Griffin/Wesley McClain tied for second at 18-under (266).

items.title: Jerry Gunthorpe rallies from five back to win Golfweek Senior Division National Championship
items.why: On 2026-03-30: Jerry Gunthorpe fired a final-round 68 to come from five shots behind and capture the Golfweek Senior Division National Championship at Desert Willow Golf Resort's Mountain View Course in Palm Desert, CA. He finished at 4-under 212, one shot clear of Jeff Collett and Kevin VandenBerg.

items.title: Up next: TaylorMade TP5 Junior All-Star heads to Longleaf Golf & Family Club (April 2-5)
items.why: On 2026-03-30: The AJGA circuit resumes this week with the TaylorMade TP5 Junior All-Star at Longleaf Golf & Family Club in Southern Pines, NC. The Junior All-Star Series event features a 132-player field of boys and girls ages 12-15 competing in 54 holes of stroke play with a 36-hole cut.

items.title: Champions Cup Four-Ball Final Round: Gibbons/Stewart surge to -19 lead through 9
items.why: On 2026-03-29: Josh Gibbons and Kade Stewart have grabbed the lead at 19-under through 9 holes in the final round at Champions Golf Club in Houston. Charlie Holland/Jordan Russell and Will Griffin/Wesley McClain are tied at T2 at -18, with Marcus Jones/Brad Mason fourth at -15.

items.title: Augusta National Women’s Amateur field locked in — 48 of top 50 in WAGR set to compete
items.why: On 2026-03-29: The 72-player field for the seventh Augusta National Women’s Amateur (April 2-5) features 48 of the top 50 in the World Amateur Golf Ranking, led by No. 1 Kiara Romero. Two past champions—Tsubasa Kajitani (2021) and Anna Davis (2022)—return as amateurs. First two rounds at Champions Retreat, final round at Augusta National.

items.title: Up next: 2026 Senior Masters at Indian Wells Resort (April 9-11)
items.why: On 2026-03-29: The Society of Seniors schedule turns to the 2026 Senior Masters at Indian Wells Resort (Players and Celebrity Course) in Indian Wells, CA, April 9-11. The Senior Masters follows the 41st Ed Tutwiler Two-Man held earlier this month at The Reserve Golf Club in Pawleys Island, SC, with the Founders Cup (April 13-16 in Rancho Mirage, CA) up next after that.

items.title: Champions Cup Four-Ball: Holland/Russell surge to -16 lead after Round 2
items.why: On 2026-03-28: Charlie Holland and Jordan Russell fired a second-round 63 to take a two-shot lead at 16-under heading into Round 3 at Champions Golf Club in Houston. Will Griffin and Wesley McClain sit second at -14 (62 in R2), with Marcus Jones/Brad Mason and Josh Gibbons/Kade Stewart tied at -12.

items.title: Asterisk Talley to have fellow world No. 1 Miles Russell caddie at Augusta National Women's Amateur
items.why: On 2026-03-28: World No. 1 junior Asterisk Talley will have boys No. 1 Miles Russell on the bag when the Augusta National Women's Amateur tees off April 2-5. Talley and Russell are both reigning Junior Invitational at Sage Valley champions.

items.title: Hoag Classic: Paul Goydos leads at -9 after opening 62 at Newport Beach CC
items.why: On 2026-03-28: Paul Goydos fired a bogey-free 62 to grab the first-round lead at the Hoag Classic. Zach Johnson and Brian Gay are one back at -8, with Steven Alker and Freddie Jacobson at -7. The 54-hole event wraps up Sunday at Newport Beach Country Club.

items.title: Champions Cup Four-Ball Round 2: Maxwell/Meinhart lead at -8 after opening 63
items.why: On 2026-03-27: Round 2 is underway at Champions Golf Club in Houston. Kyle Maxwell and Derek Meinhart hold the lead at 8-under after a blistering opening-round 63. Blanton Farmer and Ryan Terry sit one back at -7, with Charlie Holland/Jordan Russell and Robby Ormand/Jordan Woolf tied at T3 at -6.

items.title: Augusta National Women's Amateur field set — 72 players head to Augusta
items.why: On 2026-03-27: The field is locked in for the seventh Augusta National Women's Amateur (April 2-5), with 72 of the world's top amateurs set to compete. First two rounds at Champions Retreat before the final round at Augusta National.

items.title: Up next: 2026 Senior Masters at Indian Wells Resort (April 9-11)
items.why: On 2026-03-27: The Society of Seniors schedule turns to the 2026 Senior Masters at Indian Wells Resort (Players and Celebrity Course) in Indian Wells, CA, April 9-11, following the 41st Ed Tutwiler Two-Man earlier this month at The Reserve Golf Club in Pawleys Island, SC.

items.why: On 2026-03-25: The AJGA previewed its first tournament at Old Hickory (Nashville), outlining the March 19–22 field (78 juniors, 21 states) and a short “players to watch” list

items.title: Miles Russell Makes History as First Back-to-Back Junior Invitational Champion at Sage Valley
items.why: On 2026-03-24: Russell won at 15-under 273, becoming the first player to win the Junior Invitational in consecutive years. Asterisk Talley claimed the girls title at 8-under.

items.title: Meet the Amateurs in the 2026 Masters: Six Different Paths to Augusta National
items.why: On 2026-03-24: The 2026 Masters amateur class features the U.S. Mid-Amateur champion, representing the side of amateur golf built on persistence and maturity outside the elite junior pipeline.

items.title: U.S. Senior Open Qualifying Registration Closes Tomorrow
items.why: On 2026-03-24: Local qualifying entries close March 25 at 5pm ET. Qualifying runs April 2 through May 7, with finishers earning a spot in the 156-player field at Scioto.

items.title: Texas South Mid-Am: Coy Dobson cruises to South Mid-Amateur title at 8-under
items.why: On 2026-03-23: Austin’s Coy Dobson finished -8 (208) across three rounds (67-71-70), winning by five shots over runners-up John Beringer and Josh Goldstein (both -3 / 213)

items.title: Race to Medinah Is On: AJGA releases initial 2026 Junior Presidents Cup team standings
items.why: On 2026-03-23: The AJGA/Presidents Cup released the first 2026 Junior Presidents Cup standings for the Sept. 20–21 matches at Medinah (Courses 1 & 2), with Matt Kuchar captaining the U.S. side and C.T. Pan leading the Internationals as qualification runs through late summer

items.why: On 2026-03-22: Final-round scoring is on tap Sunday as the Texas South Mid-Amateur closes out its three-day run at Forest Creek (Mar 22, 2026).

items.why: On 2026-03-22: Ty Gould led at 2-under with Will Sallee one back (1-under) heading into Sunday play (Mar 22, 2026).

items.why: On 2026-03-22: The Senior final is Todd Doss vs. Bob Niger and the Super Senior final is Jeff Thomas vs. Dean Prince at TPC Harding Park (Mar 22, 2026).
